ipAllowlist.label: IP Allowlisting (Recommended)
ipAllowlist.description: Add the Testurio static egress IPs to your staging environment's firewall or CDN allowlist. No credentials needed.
ipAllowlist.setupStep1: 1. Copy the IP addresses shown above.
ipAllowlist.setupStep2: 2. Add them to your firewall or CDN allowlist (e.g. Cloudflare, Azure Front Door, nginx).
ipAllowlist.setupStep3: 3. Done — the worker will connect transparently on every test run.

basicAuth.label: HTTP Basic Auth
basicAuth.passwordStoredHint: A password is stored. Enter a new value to replace it.

headerToken.label: Custom Header Token
headerToken.headerNameHint: Alphanumeric characters and hyphens only, e.g. X-Testurio-Token
headerToken.valueStoredHint: A value is stored. Enter a new value to replace it.

validation.headerNameInvalid: Header name must contain only alphanumeric characters and hyphens.
